case_title: CENDEJAS, JESUS GONZALEZ VS FARFAN VICTORINO DBA MANOLO AUTO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENDEJAS, JESUS GONZALEZ  C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARFAN VICTORINO DBA MANOLO AUTO $3,782.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,832.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF ATTEMPTED SERVICE AFTER DUE AND DILIGENT INQUIRY RETURNED NOT SERVED UNABLE TO MAKE PERSONAL DELIVERY (NON ESTUS).
